name: B.S.D Crown Ltd.
summary: B.S.D Crown Ltd., through its subsidiaries, imports, markets, and distributes various food products to retail chains, supermarkets, wholesalers, and institutions primarily in Israel. It is also involved in the credit activities, including provision of loans to others. The company was formerly known as Emblaze Ltd. and changed its name to B.S.D Crown Ltd. in August 2014. B.S.D Crown Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Ramat Gan, Israel.
